evidence: standards/enterprise/data-lifecycle.md and the final joined AI consistency review
exception_policy: No exception permits plaintext restricted data; a temporary confidential-data exception requires exact scope, compensating protection, owner, expiry, and removal plan.
statement: Confidential and restricted data at rest MUST use platform-approved encryption and data protection appropriate to its class, with key material protected separately from encrypted content and never embedded in source or general storage.
